extraction.text:
BLESSING PHIRI
Cloud & DevOps Engineer | Kubernetes & OpenShift | Azure Cloud | High Availability
blessingphiri79@gmail.com| https://github.com/blessing-bester| https://www.linkedin.com/in/blessingphiri/
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
With 4+ years of experience, I design and operate HA infrastructure on Azure, Kubernetes, and OpenShift, implement monitoring and alerting pipelines, enforce RBAC and operational best practices, and improve deployment reliability.
I help companies operate reliable, scalable, and secure cloud and Kubernetes platforms, reducing production incidents, automating deployments, and modernizing legacy systems.
CORE SKILLS
Kubernetes & OpenShift (production clusters, AKS)
Helm & Kustomize (Kubernetes deployment workflows)
Azure Cloud (Resource Manager, App Service, Storage, AKS, VMs, Networking)
Linux Systems & Networking
High Availability & Resilient Architecture
CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps concepts)
PowerShell & Scripting (Bash, Azure CLI)
Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
Monitoring & Observability (Azure Monitor, Prometheus, Grafana, custom metrics)
Security & RBAC best practices
Cloud Architecture Principles (Scalability, Reliability, Performance, Cost Optimization)
Stakeholder Communication & Solution Design
Agile / SCRUM & On-call Operational Support
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Infrastructure / DevOps Engineer
Advanced Communication Systems | Nov 2023- Dec 2025
Owned and operated hybrid cloud Kubernetes platforms (Azure & on-prem OpenShift), ensuring availability, scalability, and secure operations.
Built and maintained monitoring and alerting pipelines, including custom metrics, enabling proactive detection and faster incident resolution.
Acted as an escalation point for complex production incidents, performing root cause analysis and driving long-term corrective and preventive actions.
Partnered with application and QA teams to support CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions; aligned with Azure DevOps and Kubernetes-native delivery models, reducing manual operational effort and improving release reliability.
Managed Azure workloads including VMs, Storage, App Service, AKS, and networking, contributing to solution design and architecture discussions.
Implemented security best practices and RBAC controls across production clusters, improving operational compliance and access management.
Infrastructure / Linux Admin
Advanced Communication Systems | Nov 2021- Nov 2023
Administered and supported Linux-based production systems, maintaining high uptime for customer-facing applications.
Performed system health checks, performance tuning, and capacity planning, proactively identifying and resolving bottlenecks.
Troubleshot complex issues across Linux systems, containers, networking, and distributed services in production environments.
Investigated and resolved system incidents, escalating complex issues and contributing to root cause analysis.
Collaborated with senior engineers to implement operational improvements and basic automation.
KEY PROJECTS
Legacy PBX Modernization (Vicidial → OpenShift)
Migrated a monolithic PBX system to a highly available OpenShift platform using Kubernetes, KubeVirt, and Ceph.
Designed for fault tolerance, scalability, and reliability across compute, storage, and network layers.
Supported Helm/Kustomize deployments and CI/CD integration for smoother operations.
Contributed to architectural discussions optimizing cost, performance, and operational efficiency.
Improved system resilience and operational stability during peak usage periods.
EDUCATION
Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting
Chinhoyi University of Technology | 2019 - 2024
Professional Certifications
The Linux Foundation- CKA, CKAD, KCNA, KCSA
Red Hat – RHCSA, RHCE, Container Specialist, OpenShift Administrator, OpenShift Virtualization
Hashi Corp- Terraform Associate
Microsoft- Microsoft Azure Associate Administrator
